request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure puts national security at risk? Just last year, a major power grid failure was traced back to vulnerabilities in imported systems. We can't afford to wait for another crisis. It's time to prioritize strategic autonomy and invest in domestic solutions. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
